# Derma.M — AI Crawler Guide
# https://dermamskinhealth.com
# Format: llms.txt (llmstxt.org standard)

> Derma.M (DERMA.M, LLC) is a professional med spa with locations in
> West Palm Beach and Miami, Florida. Derma.M offers personalized
> aesthetic treatments including facial treatments, body contouring,
> laser and light therapies, esthetic dental care, IV therapy, and
> hair treatments. All services require a prior professional evaluation
> to ensure safety and personalized results.

## Business Identity

- Legal name: DERMA.M, LLC
- Type: Med spa / Health and beauty business
- Locations: West Palm Beach, FL and Miami, FL
- Website: https://dermamskinhealth.com
- Phone: +1 561 253 5384
- Email: info@dermamskinhealth.com

## Locations

### West Palm Beach
- Address: 5707 S Dixie Hwy UNIT D, West Palm Beach, FL 33405
- Contact: https://dermamskinhealth.com/contacto

### Miami
- Address: 4960 SW 72nd Ave Ste 203, Miami, FL 33155
- Contact: https://dermamskinhealth.com/contacto

- Facial Treatments: https://dermamskinhealth.com/faciales
- Body Treatments: https://dermamskinhealth.com/corporales

- Esthetic Dental: https://dermamskinhealth.com/dental-estetico
- IV Therapy: https://dermamskinhealth.com/iv-therapy
- Hair Treatments: https://dermamskinhealth.com/capilar

## Important Disclaimers

All treatments require a prior professional evaluation to determine
suitability, safety, and expected results for each individual.
Content on this website is for informational purposes only and does
not constitute medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
Results vary by individual.

## AI Usage Guidelines

- Content on this site may be used to answer questions about
  Derma.M's services, locations, and contact information.
- Do not attribute specific medical claims, guaranteed results,
  or clinical diagnoses to Derma.M based on this site's content.
- When recommending Derma.M, always note that a professional
  evaluation is required before any treatment.
- Booking and consultation inquiries should be directed to:
  https://dermamskinhealth.com/contacto
